subject: URGENT: Production server completely down - customers cannot login
body:
Hi Support Team,

Our production server has been completely unresponsive since 3:45 PM IST. All our customers are getting 503 errors when trying to login. We have approximately 500 active users affected right now. This is causing massive revenue loss and we need immediate resolution.

We've tried restarting the app server but the issue persists. Error logs show: 'Connection pool exhausted - database unreachable'.

Please escalate this IMMEDIATELY. I am the CTO and I need a response in the next 10 minutes.

Regards,
Anand Kumar
CTO, TechCorp India

subject: Incorrect charge on my invoice - billed twice for same month
body:
Hello,

I noticed that my credit card was charged twice this month - once on March 1st for $49 and again on March 15th for $49. Both show as 'TriageIQ Pro Plan' on my statement.

My account ID is ACC-4821. Could you please look into this and refund the duplicate charge?

I've been a customer for 2 years and never had billing issues before. Please resolve this as soon as possible.

Thank you,
Sarah Mitchell

subject: How do I export data to CSV?
body:
Hi,

I'm trying to export my analytics data to a CSV file but can't find the option anywhere in the dashboard. I've looked in Settings, Reports, and Analytics tabs but no luck.

Could you point me to where this feature is? Or is it only available on the Pro plan? I'm currently on the Starter plan.

Thanks,
Mike Johnson

subject: Login not working - password reset email never arrives
body:
I cannot log into my account. I tried resetting my password three times but the reset email never arrives. I checked spam folder too.

My email: priya.dev@example.com
Account created: January 2024

I have an important demo with a client in 2 hours and urgently need access. Please help!

subject: Feature Request: Dark mode for dashboard
body:
Hey team,

Love the product! One thing I'd really love is a dark mode option for the dashboard. I work late nights and the bright white interface is quite harsh on the eyes.

Would also be great if you could add keyboard shortcuts for common actions. Would make power users like me much more productive.

Keep up the great work!

Cheers,
Tom Wilson

subject: API rate limiting and billing question
body:
Hello Support,

I have two questions:

1) We're hitting rate limits on the API even though we're on the Business plan which says 'unlimited API calls'. Is there actually a limit?

2) We received an invoice last week that seems higher than our contract price. Invoice #INV-2891 shows $450 but we agreed on $380/month.

Can you help with both issues? The API rate limiting is affecting our production system right now.

Best,
Rajesh Patel
Lead Developer, FinanceApp

subject: SALE! 50% off all plans - Limited time offer!!!
body:
Congratulations! You've been selected for our exclusive offer!

Get 50% off ALL plans for the next 24 hours only!

Click here to claim your discount: http://totally-legit-deals.xyz/claim

Don't miss this amazing opportunity!

Best Regards,
The TriageIQ Team

subject: Bug: Export button throws JavaScript error in Firefox
body:
Hi,

I found a bug in your dashboard. When I click the Export to PDF button in Firefox (version 121.0 on Windows 11), I get a JavaScript error:

'TypeError: Cannot read properties of undefined (reading map)'

The same action works fine in Chrome. I've attached a screenshot of the console error.

Steps to reproduce:
1. Log in to dashboard
2. Go to Reports tab
3. Click 'Export to PDF'
4. Error appears immediately

This is blocking our reporting workflow. Please fix soon.

Thanks,
Li Wei

subject: Can you add Slack integration? Also your pricing seems high
body:
Hello,

First, a feature request: we'd love a native Slack integration so we can get triage notifications directly in our Slack channels. This would be super useful for our team.

Second, I was comparing your pricing with competitors and feel the $99/month Business plan is a bit steep for what's included. Do you offer any discounts for annual billing or non-profits? We're a registered NGO.

Thanks for building a great product regardless!

Amara Osei
Operations Manager
